banlist.methodology: Snapshot of Scryfall's machine-readable legalities (the ban truth) as of this bulk-data pull. Scryfall's legality statuses are legal/not_legal/restricted/banned — there is no separate 'suspended' status, so Vintage-style restricted cards are reported alongside banned rather than inventing a status Scryfall doesn't expose. See the linked Wizards announcement page for the human explanation and change history; Scryfall doesn't carry ban dates, so this row does not claim a 'last B&R change' date it can't ground.

sources: Card legalities + sets via Scryfall (scryfall.com)

calendar.methodology: Recent real (non-digital) expansion/core/commander/masters sets from Scryfall's /sets endpoint, newest first — near-zero maintenance per METAHUB-SPEC.md module 4. 'standard_legal' is read directly off whether Scryfall reports ANY card from that set as Standard-legal (ground truth, not a hand-maintained rotation calendar).

edh_tournaments.methodology: Real Commander/cEDH tournament results from topdeck.gg's public tournament-results API (last 30 days, format=EDH) -- see the per-event event_url for the source. Up to 40 of the most recent events are shown; top_standings = up to 8 players per event, ranked by OUR OWN win differential (wins - losses, ties broken by wins) -- topdeck.gg's real API carries no organizer-tagged 'placement'/'standing' field, so this is not the event's official final standings. commanders = the standing's real commander name(s) ONLY when topdeck.gg's structured decklist import (deckObj.Commanders, verified live 2026-07-11 as genuinely real for roughly 43% of standings -- most commonly a Moxfield import) is present for that standing; otherwise null, never inferred from an unparsed decklist. sample_size = player_count (a real recorded event, not a statistical estimate, hence always-high confidence like the banlist/calendar modules).

constructed_tiers.methodology: Real tournament-backed win rates for Standard/Pioneer/Modern, computed by us from topdeck.gg's public tournament-results API (Tournament results via topdeck.gg -- see the per-row topdeck_url for the source event). archetype_or_deck = the organizer's own archetype tag when topdeck.gg carries one for that standing, else the raw deck/decklist name reported, else the honest 'Unclassified Deck' bucket -- we never infer an archetype from an unparsed decklist link. sample_size = total recorded match games (wins+losses+draws) across every event counted this run; event_count = distinct tournaments the archetype/deck appeared in; best_finish = its best final standing across those events. Tier = match win rate (S>=60%, A>=55%, B>=50%, C>=45%, else D); an archetype with zero recorded games renders 'unrated', never a guessed tier.

sources: Tournament results via topdeck.gg
Tournament results via topdeck.gg

commander_tiers.methodology: Deck-frequency tiers computed by us from the Archidekt public decklist corpus: 'trending' = newest decks (orderBy=-createdAt), 'established' = most-viewed decks (orderBy=-viewCount). Tier is the commander's deck-count rank-percentile within its bucket (S>=90th, A>=70th, B>=40th, C>=15th, else D). This measures popularity + momentum, NOT a constructed win rate — we don't have proprietary tracker telemetry for that (see METAHUB-SPEC.md's honesty rails). top_inclusions = the non-land cards most often played alongside that commander across the decks we scanned. Tournament-result axis (topdeck.gg): published.

limited_tiers.methodology: Real win rates from 17lands' public PremierDraft card ratings (CC BY 4.0) for the current premier set. Tier = ever-drawn win rate vs the field (S>=56%, A>=53%, B>=50.5%, C>=48%, else D); sample_size = game_count. Cards with no recorded games render 'unrated', never a guessed tier.
attribution: Win rates via 17lands.com public card ratings (CC BY 4.0)

formats.methodology: One hub-card row per tracked format: legal-set list + banned/restricted counts from Scryfall legalities (ground truth), our own coverage state for this hub (honest 'pending' where a module isn't live yet), and cite-and-link-only external tracker URLs (untapped.gg, MTGGoldfish) — we NEVER ingest their numbers, only link to them by name.

sources: Card legalities + sets via Scryfall (scryfall.com)

meta_movers.methodology: Day-over-day diff of THIS hub's own two most recently published mtg-meta.json / mtg-draft.json payloads -- not an external source. Computed at publish time by reading the games-hub clone's EXISTING payload before it is overwritten this run. commander_riser / commander_faller = the top 8 commanders (each direction) by deck_count delta within the SAME format+bucket across the two runs; draft_grade_change = cards whose BuildKit Draft Score grade moved between runs for a set tracked in BOTH payloads' overall_rows; banlist_add / banlist_remove = cards that entered/left a format's banned+restricted list; new_set = a set_code appearing in calendar this run that was not in the previous payload. Every row carries this run's own computed_at (the standard honesty field) PLUS previous_computed_at/current_computed_at -- the two payload timestamps actually being compared. A first publish (no previous payload found in games-hub) or any --dry-run (which never touches the games-hub clone) both ship the honest 'pending_history' status with zero rows rather than guessing a diff.
attribution: BuildKit MTG Meta Hub (diff of our own two most-recently published runs)
